growth_records.cite: Park, Mee-Rye et al. Revealing oxidative pentose metabolism in new Pseudomonas putida isolates. Environmental Microbiology (2022). DOI:10.1111/1462-2920.16296. [PMC10107873]
growth_records.snippet: P. alloputida KT2440 ... Glucose 0.64 +/- 0.01 (Growth rate mu_max, h-1). Maximum specific growth rates estimated by calculating the slope of the semi-log plot of OD600 versus time in exponential phase.
growth_records.notes: Table 1, glucose column. mu_max=0.64 h-1 measured (OD600 exponential-slope). Doubling time calculated td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.64=1.08 h. Carbon source 5 g/L (=0.5% w/v). pH of minimal medium not stated. No uptake/secretion/yield rates reported in paper (proteomics + CRISPRi study).
